_comment: Each key is a lunch item name, shown in the Lunch dropdown. 'ingredients' is a list of strings and is combined into the shopping list on the results page, same as dinner recipes. 'instructions' is a short method. 'vegetarian' is true or false and controls the green asterisk marker. 'cost' is a plain number, no currency symbol — the 'currency' field in recipes.json sets which symbol is shown for it across the whole site.

Ham & Cheese Sandwich.instructions: Butter the bread, layer the ham and cheese, and slice in half.

Chicken Caesar Wrap.instructions: Toss lettuce with dressing and parmesan, add sliced chicken, and roll up in the wrap.

Vegetable Soup & Bread.instructions: Simmer the vegetables in stock for 20 mins until soft, then blend if desired. Serve with the bread roll.

Tuna Pasta Salad.instructions: Cook and cool the pasta, then mix with tuna, sweetcorn, cucumber and mayonnaise.

Falafel Wrap.instructions: Spread hummus over the wrap, add salad, onion and falafel, then roll up tightly.

Jacket Potato with Cheese & Beans.instructions: Bake or microwave the potato until soft, split open, and top with warmed beans and grated cheese.

BLT Sandwich.instructions: Grill the bacon until crisp. Spread mayonnaise on the bread, then layer bacon, lettuce and tomato.

Egg Mayo Sandwich.instructions: Hard-boil and chop the eggs, mix with mayonnaise, then pile onto the bread with lettuce.

Cheese & Pickle Sandwich.instructions: Spread pickle over one slice of bread, layer with cheese, and top with the second slice.

Chicken & Sweetcorn Soup.instructions: Simmer the stock, sweetcorn and shredded chicken together for 5 mins. Serve hot with the bread roll.
